summary.zhHant: Lamb Tagine-Style Plate is a practical two-person North African dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.
summary.yue: Lamb Tagine-Style Plate is a practical two-person North African dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.

nutritionAssumptions.reason: Included as a practical cooking-fat estimate for the two-person method.
Included as a light seasoning estimate; users can reduce salt to taste.

detail.zhHant: Set out Lamb, Couscous, Mushrooms, Harissa, Olive oil, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Lamb Tagine-Style Plate cooks evenly for two people.
detail.yue: Set out Lamb, Couscous, Mushrooms, Harissa, Olive oil, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Lamb Tagine-Style Plate cooks evenly for two people.
detail.en: Set out Lamb, Couscous, Mushrooms, Harissa, Olive oil, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Lamb Tagine-Style Plate cooks evenly for two people.

detail.zhHant: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Lamb until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.
detail.yue: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Lamb until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.
detail.en: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Lamb until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.

detail.zhHant: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.
detail.yue: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.
detail.en: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.

detail.zhHant: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Lamb Tagine-Style Plate in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
detail.yue: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Lamb Tagine-Style Plate in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
detail.en: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Lamb Tagine-Style Plate in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
